description: Legal document, possibly a draft, in Judaeo-Arabic. Crude hand. Specifying the conditions of the betrothal (erusin) between Yefet al-Kohen and [... bt. ...]n b. Khalaf from Baghdād. If Yefet breaks the betrothal, he owes a fine of 10 dinars to the qodesh. The text on verso may be the continuation. The name "Yosef b. Yoshiyya known as [...]" appears at the bottom. This document was written on a piece of reused business accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
